name: Solar Panel 200W Mono
description: High-efficiency monocrystalline panel. Ideal for residential and small commercial installations. Durable and weather-resistant.

name: Solar Panel 300W Poly
description: Polycrystalline panel with 300W output. Great for larger homes and off-grid systems. Reliable and cost-effective.

name: Solar Inverter 5kW Hybrid
description: Hybrid inverter with 5kW capacity. Supports both solar and battery backup. Smart MPPT technology for maximum efficiency.

name: Solar Battery 12V 200Ah
description: Deep cycle gel battery for solar storage. 200Ah capacity, maintenance-free, and long lifespan. Ideal for backup systems.

name: Solar Water Pump 1HP
description: Submersible solar water pump. 1HP power, ideal for irrigation and domestic water supply. Runs directly from solar panels.

name: Solar Street Light 60W
description: All-in-one solar street light. 60W LED with motion sensor. Automatic dusk-to-dawn operation. Perfect for pathways and compounds.

name: Solar Charge Controller 60A
description: MPPT charge controller. 60A capacity, compatible with 12V/24V/48V systems. LCD display and multiple protection features.

name: Solar Panel 100W Mono
description: Compact 100W monocrystalline panel. Lightweight and portable. Ideal for small cabins, RVs, and camping.

name: Solar Home Kit (300W)
description: Complete solar home kit. Includes 2×150W panels, 1×5kW inverter, 2×12V batteries, and all accessories. Perfect for off-grid homes.
